THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF ATTEMPTED TO IMPROPERLY FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE OF COURT. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL PROCEDURAL REQUIREMENTS IN THE FUTURE. PARTIES ARE FURTHER ORDERED TO FAMILIARIZE THEMSELVES WITH AND FOLLOW THE LOCAL RULES.PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B).JUDGE: CHARLES F. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT NORMAN ONG, EILEEN ONG, 2030 STEINER STREET CONDOMINIUM PROJECT DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT

is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the demurrer. No opposition filed. The Court notes that Plaintiff attempted to improperly file a Second Amended Complaint without leave of Court. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with all procedural requirements in the future. Parties are further ordered to familiarize themselves with and follow the Local Rules.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Continued To Mar-17-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NORMAN ONG, EILEEN ONG, 2030 STEINER STREET CONDOMINIUM PROJECT's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Transferred to be heard in Department 501 on March 17, 2026. That department handles all real property-nuisance law and motion matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. All parties to immediately provide courtesy copies to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
